channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Pound plummets to one-month low after Burnham plots PM challenge

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham’s Route to Power Is Anything but Easy
item.description: Andy Burnham’s Route to Power Is Anything but Easy

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer ally admits prime minister is ‘unpopular’ but warns of ‘chaos’ if leadership contest triggered – UK politics live

item.title: Bloomberg.com: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer - Bloomberg.com
item.description: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How could Labour MPs trigger a leadership contest? The threshold Streeting must meet
item.description: How could Labour MPs trigger a leadership contest? The threshold Streeting must meet

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK government faces weeks of uncertainty over the prime minister's future
item.description: UK government faces weeks of uncertainty over the prime minister's future

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: LabourList: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?

item.title: FT UK Politics: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
item.description: Gilts and sterling fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
